description: Blocks axis inference built from evidence after the escape point
blocksIf: Any axis argument depends on post-escape facts for onset inference
requiredAction: Mark axis BLOCKED_OR_UNRESOLVED and restate evidence window

description: Blocks direct conversion of official probable cause into SERA axis answer
blocksIf: Axis candidate is justified only by probable-cause prose
requiredAction: Remove causal-key leakage and require factual evidence at or before gate

description: Blocks consequence or impact from being treated as human action at onset
blocksIf: Action candidate is impact/outcome instead of human act
requiredAction: Reframe action evidence to at/before gate or keep unresolved

description: Blocks automatic use of warning onset as gate or axis answer
blocksIf: Warning marker is treated as first unsafe departure without prior-threshold check
requiredAction: Require gate-consistent threshold evidence before warning

description: Blocks forced human-origin P/O/A in technical/environmental negative control
blocksIf: Human-origin axis is forced despite technical/environmental onset

description: Blocks substitution of organizational context for line-level objective at gate
blocksIf: Objective is inferred from organizational criticism without line evidence
requiredAction: Constrain objective to line-level evidence at escape point

description: Blocks moral/culpability language as axis evidence
blocksIf: Axis rationale uses blame/moral judgement vocabulary
requiredAction: Rewrite with operational factual language only

description: Blocks forced classification when evidence is insufficient
blocksIf: Axis receives class despite missing minimum evidence fields

description: Forces unresolved outcome when minimal evidence threshold fails
blocksIf: Insufficient direct evidence at or before gate for that axis
requiredAction: Record unresolved with explicit unknowns and blocker

description: Prevents release/downstream side effects during pilot design
blocksIf: Any output attempts releasedCode or downstream opening
